pkgmetadata.longdescription: Codex Desktop Linux adapts the official macOS Codex Desktop DMG into a runnable Linux Electron app. This live ebuild follows upstream main, runs the wrapper installer, and installs the generated application tree under /opt/codex-desktop-linux with a /usr/bin/codex-desktop launcher. The upstream self-update manager is intentionally disabled so Portage remains the update authority.
